title: dryopteris invisa
intro: Dryopteris invisa, also known as the Japanese shield fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris invisa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory infections.
